# {Project Name}

> Agent routing index. Full catalog: docs/README.md

## Entry
- AGENTS.md — commands, env, submodule table, GitNexus config
- docs/README.md — doc catalog, ownership rules, read order

## Architecture
- docs/SYSTEM_DESIGN.md
- docs/PROJECT_STRUCTURES.md

## Database
- docs/DATABASE_DESIGN.md (if present)

## Code structure
Use GitNexus MCP (`npx gitnexus analyze`) — do not grep for call graphs.
Cross-repo: `gitnexus group query <groupname> "<concept>"` (see AGENTS.md § GitNexus).
